data.content: Requested changes. Review result: the code changes for 10-minute timeout and agent-exclusion fallback are implemented as intended, and sanity gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery/.claude/worktrees/a5a1-scope-refinement-timeout (bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build). Blocking issue: acceptance requires verification that a failed refinement retries on a different agent and then completes successfully when an alternative is available. Current coverage in src/lib/__tests__/scope-refinement-worker.test.ts only verifies excludeAgentIds propagation and exhausted-agent failure; it does not exercise an end-to-end retry-success path through a second agent selection and successful completion. Please add an integration or equivalent worker-level test for alternate-agent retry success, then resubmit for implementation_review.
